name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, states



(* State variables *)
forks == [i \in 1..N |-> -> FALSE];
states == [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"];

(* Helper functions *)
left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1;
right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1;

(* Actions *)
PickUp(i) == 
  /\ forks[i] = FALSE
  /\ forks[left(i)] = FALSE
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![left(i)] = TRUE]
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"];

PutDown(i) == 
  /\ forks[i] = TRUE
  /\ forks[left(i)] = TRUE
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![left(i)] = FALSE]
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"];

(* Next action *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N : 
    /\ states[i] = "thinking"
    /\ forks[i] = FALSE
    /\ forks[left(i)] = FALSE
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![left(i)] = TRUE]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
    /\ states[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks[i] = TRUE
    /\ forks[left(i)] = TRUE
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![left(i)] = FALSE]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"];

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> FALSE]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"];

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>;

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}];

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = 0
      /\ flag = <<>>


Next == /\ num' = num + 1
      /\ flag' = Append(flag, num + 1)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ count' = count + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ count' = count - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
         /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
         /\ head \in 0..K-1
         /\ tail \in 0..K-1
         /\ count \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
             /\ readers' = Append(readers, r) \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES file, fileSize, filePos

Init == /\ fileSize = 0
        /\ filePos = 0
        /\ file = <<>>

Next == /\ fileSize' = fileSize
        /\ filePos' = filePos
        /\ file' = file

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, fileSize, filePos>>
